subject: Invoice INV-2026-0005 – May Facilities Management Services
preview: Attached is our invoice for facilities management and maintenance services.
body:
Dear Accounts Payable Team,

Please find attached invoice #INV-2026-0005 for facilities management, maintenance, and related services provided in May 2026.

Total Amount: USD 19,875.00
Due Date: June 16, 2026

Payment terms: Net 30. Please reference the invoice number when making payment.

Thank you for your continued business.

Best regards,
Summit Facilities Management – Finance Department
